title: MxSxC1 Time Machine Textures
description:
Time Machine Texture Pack (Alpha) - For use with our other packs.

Parrot/ Spyglass Scope  / Blocks / Mirrors / Multiple Blocks / Invisible Glass

This is for use with the The Time Machine Data Pack Moon Phases.
body:
# MxSxC1 The Time Machine - Texture Pack 1.21.10

Example shows multiple packs combined...and brief early demo of The Time Machine.
[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IaNAvAmX2Zg](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IaNAvAmX2Zg)

1.21.10 - Updated few textures. New shroomlight. Yes it's hideous it is designed to work with very specific shaders (mainly BSL) and in rain for The Dark Is A Cold Lonely Shadow. It is work in progress. It is a work in progress to produce specific effects.

**TDIACLS = The Dark Is A Cold Lonely Shadow**

WARNING SEE SPOILER!

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
These Packs contain scenes, events, bosses, and information based on "The Dark Is A Cold Lonely Shadow". 

If you plan to read the books, these are early versions of scenes from the books which are not yet finalised. And some related to books which are years away in the story.

Although there are no major reveals, there are enough with some guesswork to work out major spoilers for the books.
</details>

## Summary Of Textures

Textures are alpha, old, and non-optimised...

- Parrot (Talon from TDIACLS or in this case 'The Bird Of Time') - Older version
- Spyglass Scope (The scope from The Historian from TDIACLS) - Older version
- Invisible Glass - As it says on the tin
- TDIACLS Pumpkin & Jack O' Lantern - shameless self promotion
- Mirrors - Are more fun than televisions
- Black Mirrors - Are more scary
- Invisible Prismarine (needs tweaked as not quite working in all shaders)
- Blue Shroomlights - Bit naff better versions being worked on
- Black Glazed Terracotta (Old version of MxSxC1 Logo) - Very Old!
- Various Other Blocks

**Pack Purpose**
This pack will add specific textures for use with "The Dark Is A Cold Lonely Shadow" Data Packs and maps. This version is specifically for The Time Machine & Moon Phases.

## What This Is Not, 
This does not include (But A Good Chunk Of These Will Be Later Or Are In Our Other Packs)
- Animated Neon & Helmets
- The Genie And Historian Textures
- The existentialist (Siamese Cat)
- The Time Machine Data Pack (Alpha coming soon)
- Moon Phases (see our other pack but it does have a bonus in there for those using that pack)
- The Conduit (Red Pain - or any of the Conduits)
- Talon/Parrot - Glowing Eyes
- Custom Enchant Effects - In progress
- Soul Lantern
- Custom Particles
- Lots Of Other Textures
- Lots Of Other Effects / Customisations


**Notes For Alpha / Future / Issues**

#THIS IS ALPHA SOME OF THE TEXTURES AND PBR ARE VERY OLD WITH MISTAKES
#WE KNOW THIS, AND KNOW THEY ARE INEFFICIENT - THESE ARE OLD VERSIONS AND WORKING ON BETTER
#THEY CAN CAUSE SLOW DOWN AND NOT YET OPTIMISED...SOME ARE 1024 * 1024 (MOST OF THESE NOW REPLACED AND LOOK BETTER)

Any screenshots (unless specified otherwise) were taken ONLY with this texture pack and our NoParticles pack. Nothing else was active. However the video and some screenshots are a combination of all our packs together - some of which are unreleased.

We are aware the PBR isn't good, this is Alpha and includes the first PBR textures we ever attempted. We know the failings, and the scales don't match - however it's what we use currently in all our videos and screenshots faulty or not.

Some of these textures are not optimised and will cause weird results and slow down in some shaders. We are aware of this, know how to fix, and planning to improve when we find time.

We are aware of the disjoint in a few cases for resolution.

This is a seriously cut down texture pack and does not include everything, and doesn't yet cover everything required for "The Time Machine".

This DOES NOT cover even a small percentage of all the textures you see in our videos.

Prismarine isn't quite working how we want it.

We have tested in around 15-20 Shader Packs, all using Iris.

**Steps To Install & Update**

Drop the folder "mxsxc1_timemachinetextures" into your resource packs folder.
```
C:\Users\[UserName]\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\resourcepacks\mxsxc1_timemachinetextures
```
Activate it
**External Links:**

**Notes / What This Pack Is Not / Or Not Yet**

Note that our videos and screenshots use around 25 packs, some unreleased, this pack does not include the below (and likely others):

- Moon Phases (AVAILABLE: See our Moon Pack)
- Glowing Animated Glitch (Sorry, soon we promise! We are Working On Some Insane Stuff)
- Crazy Glowing Stuff (We might have deliberately left the solution in this pack, we're nice like that)
- Updated Particles (nowhere near ready)
- NoParticles - (AVAILABLE: See our NoParticles Pack)
- The Genie/The Historian Texture Pack (work in progress)
- The Historians Siamese Cat (cat with glowing blue eyes)
- Glowing Phantoms
- Conduit Remastered (multiple separate packs being worked on)
- Improved Soul Lantern (not yet but template 100% done and perfect)
- Purple End Rods
- MxSxC1 End Crystals
- Mist (Wolf Skin)
- Banner Patterns
- Item Frames (will be merged into Banner & Shield Patterns)
- Stained Glass (and glowing stained glass)
- Gold Carpets
- Updated Snow (AVAILABLE: see our Sleet Pack)
- Updated Rain & Snow (AVAILABLE: see our Sleet Pack)
- Updated Terracotta (Black Glazed Is The Only One In This Pack)

---

[Miscreat Website](https://www.miscreat.co.uk/ 'miscreat.co.uk')

[GitHub][https://github.com/MxSxC1/MxSxC1TimeMachineTextures](https://github.com/MxSxC1/MxSxC1TimeMachineTextures)

We do not create mods, we create packs and data packs within Mojang framework, which will work on Realms.

Never install any packs, mods, or anything without fully understanding what they do, and ensuring it's legitimate and safe! If anything requires elevation (which ours do not), think twice and verify!

**The Dark Is A Cold Lonely Shadow**
